name: The Ark's Chicken Marsala
recipeIngredient: 8 oz chicken breast, skinless and boneless
recipeInstructions:
Note: If you don't want to go to the expense of demi-glace, you can use twice as much Burgundy wine, dissolve half a teaspoon of cornstarch in the wine before adding it to the pan, and increase the butter to 1.5 tablespoons. Use a meat cleaver to tenderize and flatten the chicken breast. Dredge in flour. Heat margarine over medium-high heat in a medium saucepan until melted. Place chicken in the pan and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and turn the chicken over. Continue cooking for 1 minute, then add mushrooms and wine. Cook until the wine is reduced by half. Remove chicken from the pan once cooked through and place on a serving plate. Add demi-glace and butter to the saucepan and stir to melt the butter. Pour the sauce over the chicken and serve.
Nutritional info per serving: 552 cal; 55g pro, 11g carb, 29g fat (48%), 1.3g fiber, 175mg chol, 337mg sodium
Source: The Ark, Davie, Florida Miami Herald, 12/14/95
